title: NR32 1XQ, Birds Eye Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/NP3333UU/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit letter and decision document for:    Operator name: Birds Eye Limited   Installation name: Lowestoft Food Factory   Permit number: EPR/NP3333UU/V006   "
